summary: M382 — solo + NG+ + hardcore fixes. Solo runs now scale enemy damage by hero count (solo 0.40x, duo 0.65x, trio 0.85x, full 1.0x) so a hardcore solo paladin can clear the prologue without being one-shot. NG+ Act 1 now uses Act 5's enemy multipliers and bumps the per-loop ngPlus values (hpBase 4.5, dmgBase 2.5) so NG+1 Act 1 actually feels like late-game combat (sim: prologue boss now 5.9 rounds vs 1.7). Hardcore mode disables the Cleric revive button (fallen stay fallen). NG+ map view now uses the dropdown zone selector instead of tabs. Tap weapon damage is now credited in the DPS meter. Hero skill mult bumped 0.70→0.82 so low-level skills feel meaningful.
